entity: 2014-15 NBA Finals: Golden State Warriors def. Cleveland Cavaliers 4-2 (first Warriors title in 40 years; Iguodala Finals MVP)
notes: Indexed from the GSW side (1610612744). First GSW title since 1975; the series is also notable for Cleveland's Kevin Love being out injured and Kyrie Irving missing games 2-3. The 4-2 margin matches BBR.
